reviewWorkflowPolicy.findingFileAvailability: private local management file; when absent from a public checkout, treat active findings as unavailable instead of creating tracked findings
reviewWorkflowPolicy.findingWriteRule: Claude Code records review and inspection findings in the findings file instead of implementing by default.
reviewWorkflowPolicy.codexReadRequirement: Codex must read the findings file before automation implementation work when that private local file exists.
reviewWorkflowPolicy.codexPriorityRule: Codex resolves active Claude Code findings before other implementation tasks unless the user explicitly overrides the priority.

commitPolicy.subjectPolicy: Use a concise imperative subject that describes the single purpose of the commit.
commitPolicy.historyPolicy: All commits on published project branches must follow this format before push. When owner-approved history repair is required, rewrite only commit messages and preserve original author and committer dates.
